sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108828" key="u(pomukthri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπομυκτηρίζω</orth>, <sense id="n108828.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sneer at,</tr_> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινα</itype> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0481.tlg001:1:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicol.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
